title: Implement erosion and sediment control measures
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement erosion and sediment control measures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for implementation and construction

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify the suitability of equipment and attachments for terrain and control works.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select materials required for proposed works according to plans and specifications.
